name: Minerals 260 Limited
description: Minerals 260 Limited is an Australia-based mineral exploration and development company focused on discovering and developing highly profitable precious and base metal projects. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX:MI6), the company manages a diverse portfolio of assets, including the significant Bullabulling Gold Project, as well as the Moora and Aston projects. With a strategic commitment to exploration excellence, Minerals 260 aims to transition into a leading mid-tier gold mining company by leveraging its high-quality tenement holdings in world-class mining regions across Australia.
